narrative:
Pepper Pike City has 5,738 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.2 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +17.7% D−R vs +14.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
